data.name: You reincarnated into the game world and fucked the NPCs!-Animation-
data.detailed_description:
■Contents of the work■

Reincarnated into a Game World!? A Village Full of Busty NPCs! In this

RPG village setting, you will ravage every NPC!

All female characters are animated with Live2D-style animations!

Not only for H-scenes but also for character sprites, penetration, ejaculation, and even the aftermath ? all fully animated!

* Bouncing breasts and butts!

* Realistic facial expressions! Blinking eyes, and pupils that move!

The once emotionless NPCs... watch their expressions gradually change into ecstasy!

■Situation■

The NPCs will gradually become more responsive...

* They are not unresponsive!

Attack the NPCs in a variety of situations!

■ NPCs with Unique Personalities! ■

There are also numerous side characters!

Some side characters can even be stripped completely naked!

The game is a simple and short exploration-based RPG.

■ Warning ■

  • Some scenes in the game contain depictions and dialogues of sexual acts that are inappropriate for minors.

  • Some scenes include depictions and dialogues of sexual acts regardless of consent, which are inappropriate for minors.

  • Some scenes include acts of cutting clothing.

  • Some scenes include depictions and dialogues suggesting infidelity.

  • Some scenes include characters confined in enclosed spaces.

  • Some scenes include depictions and dialogues involving theft of money or items.

■ Update ■

More H-scenes are planned to be added in future updates!

data.short_description: Reincarnated into a Game World!? A Village Full of Busty NPCs! In this RPG village setting, you will ravage every NPC!★ Bouncing breasts and butts!★ Realistic facial expressions! Blinking eyes, and pupils that move!
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 / 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or equivalent (Dual-core CPU, 2.5 GHz or better)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.4 compatible GPU (e.g., Intel HD Graphics 4400 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or equivalent (Dual-core CPU, 2.5 GHz or better)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.4 compatible GPU (e.g., Intel HD Graphics 4400 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
